items.name_en: In Stock! Chanel Cerf New Tote
items.name_cn:
In Stock! Chanel Cerf New Tote
Chanel 2026 New Cerf Tote,
Interpreting eternal elegance with a minimalist design.
Crafted from selected fine embossed calfskin,
Adorned with the iconic double-C gold clasp, a classic that never goes out of style.
The simple and atmospheric tote shape is effortless to carry on one shoulder,
Suitable for various outfit styles.
Creates a capable aura for the workplace,
Or showcases high taste for daily outings.
This Cerf tote is the perfect choice for a Chanel girl,
Perfectly blending practicality and luxury.
Those who have sold it understand,
There are too many positive reviews.

items.name_en: In stock! YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller 👉 The chain bag is already on fire in the fashion world. This old French luxury brand has an extraordinary magic, and the look is full of highlights 💫! Imported original cowhide 🐂, Italian custom-engraved logo hardware 🔱, every detail is authentic with ZP standards! A favorite of celebrities, high appearance value aside, it is also a powerhouse 👌 Dimensions: 20×17×6cm, Model 1888

items.name_cn:
In stock!!️
New Dior Voyage bag, so cool! The new shape is full of sporty vibes and an irresistible sense of luxury. Vintage waxed leather paired with classic letter hardware creates an effortless chic look. With an adjustable shoulder strap, it handles various carrying styles with ease. Full of design details and a huge capacity, it is a must-have item for sports and outings.
size: 28*18*12cm

items.name_cn:
In stock!!️
Toujours series latest autumn/winter grained leather, absolutely stunning, high-visibility large bag, very fresh color, eye-catching, effortlessly exudes a premium feel. Oversized quilted grained leather design paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels luxurious, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:28.5*19*21cm

items.name_cn:
In stock!!️
Original leather lining with sheepskin and wool felt. D-Joy bag, sheepskin, 2023 model. Fashion is truly cyclical; this is a return to the vintage Diana bag. The rectangular shape with a short chain and a slim shoulder strap is absolutely god-tier!! Strong retro and trendy feel, suitable for any occasion😉. It is definitely the pinnacle of 'lady' style. Strongly standing out, sisters👱‍♀️
Size: 16*5.5*10cm

In Stock!!️
Lady's latest 5-compartment bow Diana Bag 🎀, crafted from fine sheepskin, a must-have Diana bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld, it exudes femininity. A classic fashion style. A beauty everyone on Instagram and many fashion icons has. Don't miss it ❤️
size: 24cm

items.name_cn:
In stock❗️
Goyard Beluga Basket Red♥️
The vintage large tote basket is now "born"!!
Sure enough, any bag looks cute when it shrinks🥰🥰
However, this is cute with a touch of ceremony
Because of these handles~the whole bag is elevated
Usually, the Beluga basket is open
The designer was thoughtful to add a drawstring pouch inside
A basket that can be closed gives peace of mind
I placed an order immediately after the agent posted the photo
This must be snatched up, a sure-fire hit🔥
A hit requires speed and accuracy!
Otherwise, if you clash with someone else's bag, the one with the wrong version will be awkward
Our craftsmanship needs no explanation, buy with confidence and wear with confidence!
6045🔴23×18.5×8cm
